title: erythroxylum seyrigi
intro: Erythroxylum seyrigi is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the coca or coca family, native to Madagascar. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Erythroxylum seyrigi include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to have a range of therapeutic effects when used appropriately.
